sentence: كَيف حَالَك الْيَوم؟ عَسَاك طَيِّب.
raw: كيف حالك اليوم؟ عساك طيب.
ipa: ˈkajf ˈħaːlak alˈjawm ʕaˈsaːk ˈtˤɑjjib
gloss_en: How are you today? I hope you are well.
notes: kayf with plain /k/ — NO affrication (albalushi2016: sedentary Omani lacks Gulf čim); diphthongs ay/aw RETAINED (albalushi2016: Omani sedentary diagnostic vs Gulf ē/ō)

sentence: اَلْقَهْوَة الْعُمَانِيَّة طَيِّبَة مَع التَّمَر وَالْحَلْوَى.
raw: القهوة العمانية طيبة مع التمر والحلوى.
ipa: alˈqahwa lʕumaːˈnijja ˈtˤɑjjiba ˈmaʕ ˈattamar walˈħalwaː
gloss_en: Omani coffee is good with dates and halwa.
notes: ق=/q/ retained qahwa (albalushi2016: Muscat sedentary); sun assimilation at-t; geminate يّ

sentence: مَا أَبْغَى شَاي، أَبْغَى قَهْوَة خَفِيفَة بَس.
raw: ما أبغى شاي، أبغى قهوة خفيفة بس.
ipa: maː ˈʔabɣaː ˈʃaːj ˈʔabɣaː ˈqahwa xaˈfiːfa ˈbas
gloss_en: I don't want tea, I only want light coffee.
notes: abɣā; ق=/q/ (sedentary, vs Bedouin g, albalushi2016); ɣ voiced uvular

sentence: اِشْتَرَيت ثَلَاث كَيلُوَات سَمَك مِن سُوق مَطْرَح.
raw: اشتريت ثلاث كيلوات سمك من سوق مطرح.
ipa: ʔiʃtaˈrajt θaˈlaːθ kajluˈwaːt ˈsamak min ˈsuːq ˈmɑtˤraħ
gloss_en: I bought three kilos of fish from Mutrah market.
notes: ث retained /θ/; سَمَك plain /k/ (no affrication — diagnostic vs Gulf simač); ق=/q/ sūq; sedentary Omani /q/ retained, /k/ unaffricated, interdental retention per (albalushi2016)

sentence: هَاذَا الرَّجَّال يِشْتِغِل فِي الظَّهِيرَة عِنْد الْمِينَا.
raw: هاذا الرجال يشتغل في الظهيرة عند المينا.
ipa: ˈhaːðaː rradʒˈdʒaːl ˈjiʃtiɣil fiː ðˤðˤɑˈhiːra ˈʕind alˈmiːnaː
gloss_en: This man works at midday near the harbour.
notes: ذ retained hāða; ظ=/ðˤ/ retained (albalushi2016); geminate جّ raǧǧāl /dʒ/

sentence: اِسْمَع زَين، وَبَعْدَين قُول لِي رَايَك.
raw: اسمع زين، وبعدين قول لي رايك.
ipa: ˈʔismaʕ ˈzajn wabaʕˈdajn ˈquːl liː ˈraːjak
gloss_en: Listen well, and then tell me your opinion.
notes: Omani sedentary control: imperative qul keeps /q/ and the diphthong in baʕdayn survives (albalushi2016)

sentence: الْيَوم الْجَوّ حَار وَمَا فِيه مَطَر.
raw: اليوم الجو حار وما فيه مطر.
ipa: alˈjawm alˈdʒaww ˈħaːr wamaː ˈfiːh ˈmɑtˤɑr
gloss_en: Today the weather is hot and there's no rain.
notes: geminate جّ jaww; retained diphthong aw in al-yawm (albalushi2016: sedentary Omani keeps ay/aw, unlike mainstream Gulf ē/ō); negation mā fīh existential

sentence: بِكَم هَالسَّمَك؟ بِرِيَالَين وَنُص.
raw: بكم هالسمك؟ بريالين ونص.
ipa: ˈbikam ˈhaːlssamak birijaːˈlajn ˈwanusˤ
gloss_en: How much is this fish? Two and a half rials.
notes: plain /k/ in bikam — NO affrication (albalushi2016 p.89: the prestige Muscat/Ṣalālah sedentary koine does not productively affricate /k/); dual riyālayn keeps diphthong ay

sentence: الْمَوعِد السَّاعَة سَبْعَة فِي الصُّبْح.
raw: الموعد الساعة سبعة في الصبح.
ipa: alˈmawʕid asˈsaːʕa ˈsabʕa fiː sˤˈsˤubħ
gloss_en: The appointment is at seven in the morning.
notes: sun assimilation as-sāʕa and aṣ-ṣubḥ (geminate ṣṣ); retained diphthong aw in mawʕid (albalushi2016 sedentary)

sentence: بَيتِي فِي مَطْرَح وَأَهْلِي كُلّهُم هِنَا.
raw: بيتي في مطرح وأهلي كلهم هنا.
ipa: ˈbajtiː fiː ˈmɑtˤraħ waˈʔahliː ˈkullhum ˈhinaː
gloss_en: My house is in Mutrah and my family are all here.
notes: plain /k/ kullhum, k before /u/ (albalushi2016: no Muscat sedentary affrication); geminate ll; retained diphthong ay in bayt

sentence: سِير سِيدَة وَبَعْدَين لِف يَمِين عِنْد الْبَنْك.
raw: سير سيدة وبعدين لف يمين عند البنك.
ipa: ˈsiːr ˈsiːda wabaʕˈdajn ˈlif jaˈmiːn ˈʕind alˈbank
gloss_en: Go straight then turn right at the bank.
notes: plain /k/ coda in al-bank — no affrication (albalushi2016); retained diphthong ay in baʕdayn; imperative sīr

sentence: الْأَكْل كَان زَين وَالسَّمَك طَازَة.
raw: الأكل كان زين والسمك طازة.
ipa: alˈʔakl ˈkaːn ˈzajn ˈwassamak ˈtˤɑːza
gloss_en: The food was good and the fish was fresh.
notes: plain /k/ kān (albalushi2016 sedentary); sun assimilation was-samak; retained diphthong ay in zayn

sentence: وَين رِحْت أَمْس؟ مَا رِحْت وَلَا مَكَان.
raw: وين رحت أمس؟ ما رحت ولا مكان.
ipa: ˈwajn ˈriħt ˈʔams maː ˈriħt ˈwalaː maˈkaːn
gloss_en: Where did you go yesterday? I didn't go anywhere.
notes: retained diphthong ay in wayn — Muscat sedentary keeps /aj/ and does NOT monophthongize to wēn (albalushi2016); negation mā ... walā

sentence: كَم وَاحِد يِبْغَى قَهْوَة؟
raw: كم واحد يبغى قهوة؟
ipa: ˈkam ˈwaːħid ˈjibɣaː ˈqahwa
gloss_en: How many people want coffee?
notes: ق=/q/ retained qahwa (albalushi2016 p.88: Muscat/Ṣalālah sedentary keep Old Arabic *q as [q], unlike Gulf [ɡ]); plain /k/ kam

sentence: إِذَا مَا عِنْدَك وَقْت الْيَوم، تَعَال بُكْرَة.
raw: إذا ما عندك وقت اليوم، تعال بكرة.
ipa: ˈʔiðaː maː ˈʕindak ˈwaqt alˈjawm taˈʕaːl ˈbukra
gloss_en: If you don't have time today, come tomorrow.
notes: ق=/q/ retained waqt (albalushi2016 sedentary); interdental ذ /ð/ retained in iḏā (albalushi2016 p.87); plain /k/ ʕindak; imperative taʕāl

sentence: رِحْت السُّوق، اِشْتَرَيت خُبْز وَتَمَر.
raw: رحت السوق، اشتريت خبز وتمر.
ipa: ˈriħt asˈsuːq ʔiʃtaˈrajt ˈxubz ˈwatamar
gloss_en: I went to the market, I bought bread and dates.
notes: ق=/q/ retained sūq (albalushi2016 sedentary); sun assimilation as-sūq; retained diphthong ay in ishtarayt

sentence: بَاسَافِر صَلَالَة الشَّهْر الْجَاي.
raw: باسافر صلالة الشهر الجاي.
ipa: baːˈsaːfir sˤɑˈlaːla ʃˈʃahr alˈdʒaːj
gloss_en: I'm going to travel to Salalah next month.
notes: sun assimilation ash-shahr (geminate ʃʃ); jīm /dʒ/ retained in al-jāy (albalushi2016 p.89: [dʒ] the kept realisation); future prefix b(ā)-

sentence: كَلّمْنِي الْمَغْرِب لَو سَمَحْت.
raw: كلمني المغرب لو سمحت.
ipa: ˈkallmniː lˈmaɣrib law saˈmaħt
gloss_en: Call me in the evening please.
notes: plain /k/ kallimni, k before /a/ — no affrication (albalushi2016 sedentary); geminate ll; retained diphthong aw in law

sentence: السَّلَام عَلَيكُم، كَيف الْحَال؟
raw: السلام عليكم، كيف الحال؟
ipa: assaˈlaːm ʕaˈlajkum ˈkajf alˈħaːl
gloss_en: Peace be upon you, how are things?
notes: sun assimilation as-salām (geminate ss); plain /k/ kayf; retained diphthong ay in ʕalaykum (albalushi2016 sedentary)

sentence: الصَّبْر مِفْتَاح الْفَرَج.
raw: الصبر مفتاح الفرج.
ipa: ɑsˤˈsˤɑbr mifˈtaːħ ˈalfaradʒ
gloss_en: Patience is the key to relief.
notes: emphatic ص in aṣ-ṣabr with sun assimilation (geminate ṣṣ) and emphatic backing (albalushi2016 p.90); jīm /dʒ/ retained al-faraj
